name: Quinoa Leek Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Tofu with excess water removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat sesame oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the garlic and leek, pressing the garlic to release its oils. Cook until the leek is lightly browned.
2. Stir in the tofu and quinoa, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the milk or soymilk. Season with salt or tamari and pepper to taste.
4. Lightly oil a casserole dish, then sprinkle half of the bread crumbs over the mixture.
5. Spread the mixture evenly in the dish and top with the remaining bread crumbs and grated cheese.
6. Cover the dish and bake for 20 minutes at 350°F.
7. Remove the cover and continue baking until the cheese is browned.
